The massive, highly lucrative world of global e-commerce officially absorbed the absolute, terrifying reality of the dot-com crash to close the month. The Indian political and military establishment aggressively intensified its massive, strategic focus on national security and border integrity following terrifying intelligence warnings. ## SECTION 8 — This Day in History (World)
On October 31, 1517, **Martin Luther**, the incredibly massive, fiercely defiant, and absolute foundational architect of the Protestant Reformation, reportedly nailed his "Ninety-five Theses" to the door of the All Saints' Church in Wittenberg. This incredibly massive, historically definitive act of theological rebellion aggressively challenged the absolute authority of the Roman Catholic Church, fundamentally and permanently shattering the religious and political unity of Europe and heavily launching centuries of massive cultural and geopolitical transformation.

On October 31, 1926, **Harry Houdini**, the incredibly massive, universally iconic, and absolute legendary master of illusion and escape, officially and tragically passed away in Detroit. He achieved absolute, historical immortality through his incredibly massive, death-defying escapes from heavily sealed containers and massive chains, fundamentally revolutionizing the massive art of performance magic. His incredible, massive legacy as a fierce crusader against fraudulent spiritualism cemented his absolute status as one of the most recognized figures in global entertainment history.

## SECTION 9 — This Day in History (India)
On October 31, 1984, **Indira Gandhi**, the incredibly massive, fiercely resilient, and absolute towering titan of Indian politics, was brutally and aggressively assassinated in New Delhi. She was fiercely shot dead by two of her own Sikh bodyguards in absolute, horrific retaliation for Operation Blue Star. Her incredibly massive, sudden death triggered an absolute, catastrophic explosion of massive anti-Sikh communal violence across India, resulting in thousands of tragic deaths and fundamentally altering the massive political trajectory of the Indian Republic.

On October 31, 1875, **Sardar Vallabhbhai Patel**, the incredibly massive, fiercely unyielding, and absolute "Iron Man of India," was officially born in Nadiad, Gujarat. He achieved absolute, historical immortality by heavily and aggressively utilizing his massive political brilliance to forcefully integrate over 500 independent princely states into the newly formed Republic of India. His incredibly massive, uncompromising leadership fundamentally secured the absolute, territorial integrity of the modern massive nation, cementing him as the absolute architect of a unified India.
